ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., camera, sensor) */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the device */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion capture session */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the session belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion capture device used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., calibration, capture) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_sessions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion capture session the data belongs to */,
  "mnId" INTEGER /* mnId of the data point */,
  "RefKF_Id" INTEGER /* RefKF_Id of the data point */,
  "RefKF_FrameId" INTEGER /* RefKF_FrameId of the data point */,
  "NextId" INTEGER /* NextId of the data point */,
  "FirstKF" INTEGER /* FirstKF of the data point */,
  "FirstFrame" INTEGER /* FirstFrame of the data point */,
  "PoseX" REAL /* PoseX of the data point */,
  "PoseY" REAL /* PoseY of the data point */,
  "PoseZ" REAL /* PoseZ of the data point */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data point (e.g., 0.8 for 80%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES motion_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_3d_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 3D model */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion capture session the 3D model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the 3D model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the 3D model (e.g., mesh, point cloud) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the 3D model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the 3D model was last updated */,
  "model_format" TEXT /* Format of the 3D model (e.g., OBJ, STL) */,
  "model_size" INTEGER /* Size of the 3D model in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_3d_models_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES motion_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion capture data or 3D model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data or model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_devices" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion capture session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "device_role" TEXT /* Role of the device in the session (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_3d_models" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the 3D model */,
  "model_role" TEXT /* Role of the 3D model in the project (e.g., main, reference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_logs" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "action_target" TEXT /* Target of the action (e.g., 3D model, motion data) */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
